meaning: n.生长,种植,栽培,发育,等比级数
examples: Economic growth has slowed a little.
Feed plants to encourage steady growth.
Export growth has started to flatten out.
The U.S. needs an honest-to-God 12-step program to recover its long-term 3.5% annual growth potential.
Loyalty can bring just as good results as fear or greed, and probably more sustainable growth.
